Video.summary: The Operation Repo team faces a bike-riding gangster and a persistent young debtor.
Video.title: We Are Operation Repo

Video.summary: Froy, Matt, and Lou turn tail and bail when bats and guns are swung towards them.
Video.title: Don't You Dare Lift-off

Video.summary: Lou, Lyndah, Matt grab speedboat, truck, trailer, repo rare motorcycle, Froy, Sonia, Lou take forklift.
Video.title: Collectibles

Video.summary: Lou, Froy, Matt face assault charges, repo BMW during film shoot, find debtor's car with assistance.
Video.title: Adult Film Star

Video.summary: Matt and Froy disrupt a couple's tryst, repo a car from a pizzeria, then face challenges at a car graveyard.
Video.title: Pizza, Hook-ups, and a Suspicious Suitcase

Image.alt: Pizza, Hook-ups, and a Suspicious Suitcase
Pizza, Hook-ups, and a Suspicious Suitcase
Pizza, Hook-ups, and a Suspicious Suitcase

Video.summary: Lou orchestrates a truck ambush. Then, they repo a tractor and confront punk kids for four wheelers.
Video.title: Exterminate or Retaliate

Video.summary: Lou orders a Toyota repo post-divorce, has Froy and Matt tail another, and aids a seizing debtor.
Video.title: Unwanted Seizures

Video.summary: First, Froy and Sonia douse a couple with a dose of pepper spray when the debtor gets too pushy with Sonia.
Video.title: Pepper Spray and Guns

Video.summary: First, Sonia, Matt, Froy, and Lou roll up and roll on a gang of brothers to gain possession of an Infinity.
Video.title: Who Wants Ice Cream?

Video.summary: Lou sends Sonia & Froy to repo. Matt & Froy face citizen & cop. Sonia, Lyndah, & Matt confront repo agent.
Video.title: The Cop, the Pizza Delivery Man, and the Repo Men

Image.alt: The Cop, the Pizza Delivery Man, and the Repo Men
The Cop, the Pizza Delivery Man, and the Repo Men
The Cop, the Pizza Delivery Man, and the Repo Men

Video.summary: Sonia&Lyndah repo near wig shop. Pepper spray chaos with Lou & Froy. Froy, Sonia, & Lou face thugs for repo.
Video.title: Hairy Situations

Video.summary: Matt, Froy, & Lou repo attorney's car. Froy, Lyndah, & Sonia interrupt scene. Lou & Sonia handle ATVs.
Video.title: Legal Repossession

Video.summary: Sonia and Lou deal with a terrible boss and his instigating employees.
Video.title: Business Issues

Video.summary: A wrench is thrown in the works, and at the car, when Froy and Matt try to repo from a plumber.
Video.title: Wrench in the Works

Video.summary: Matt and Froy get some help from a friendly gardener that lead them to discover a car hidden in the backyard.
Video.title: Hidden Cars and Higher Powers

Video.summary: Lou, Sonia, and Froy have to push away a debtor while trying to push a classic car up a hill.
Video.title: Rolling Away

Video.summary: Froy & Mike repo at paintball range. Matt intervenes. Sonia & Froy repo sedan. Matt & Lou take risky job.
Video.title: Matt's Back

Video.summary: Lou & Sonia repo from gangsta gals. Matt & Froy dispute with burger-slinger. Sonia & Froy face hustler & crew.
Video.title: Burgers, Bottles, and Hustlers

Video.summary: Sonia, Lyndah weigh options: reclaim burnt car or give up?
Video.title: That's Disrespectful

Video.summary: Matt, Froy face peril in dangerous hood as debtor defends ride.
Video.title: Smoke, Lead, and Alcohol

Video.summary: Lyndah handles sobbing debtor; Matt, Froy face car and flirty ex; team confronts cultists.
Video.title: Missed Dates

Video.summary: Matt repos Vespa & Yaris, confronts insolvent dealership, unsure about Lou.
Video.title: Matt Vs. Giant Chicken

Video.summary: Froy, Lyndah deal with dentist; Frankie's repo mishap jeopardizes; Lou faces wrecked Camry with Froy trapped.
Video.title: Broken Tooth Lou and Bad Breath Frankie

Image.alt: Broken Tooth Lou and Bad Breath Frankie
Broken Tooth Lou and Bad Breath Frankie
Broken Tooth Lou and Bad Breath Frankie

Video.summary: Matt, Sonia vs. surfer; Froy, Matt handle Segway renter; Lou, Lyndah, Froy confront gangster at party.
Video.title: Segway This Way

Video.summary: Sonia, Froy get canoe; Lyndah, Sonia aid widow; Lou, Matt clash with soccer players for Camaro.
Video.title: The Canals of Deceit

Video.summary: Lyndah, Matt dispute Jeep; Froy, Sonia manage debtor; Lou, Sonia, Froy face captain, Coast Guard.
Video.title: Captain Lou

Video.summary: Matt, Lou repo BMW at club; Sonia, Matt deal with biker; Matt, Froy face debtor, tribal police on reservation.
Video.title: Native Operation

Video.summary: Lou, Sonia, Froy sting taxi repo, deal with drunk passenger.
Video.title: Should Have Seen This Coming

Video.summary: Froy, Sonia clash with wife; Matt, Sonia repo at vampire party; Matt, Froy confront drunken relatives.
Video.title: Vampires and Drunks

Video.summary: Matt, Froy grab ATV; Matt, Lou handle frat prank; Lou, Lyndah, Sonia repo Corolla from mom-to-be.
Video.title: I Don't Know What That Is

Image.alt: I Don't Know What That Is
I Don't Know What That Is
I Don't Know What That Is

Video.summary: Matt, Froy vs. guards; Lou, Sonia confront team; Froy, Sonia in love triangle.
Video.title: Incompetent and Unfaithful

Video.summary: Matt, Froy confront polygamist cult over Prius.
Video.title: Don't Cry, Bro

Video.summary: Lou, Matt, & Froy face owner with blade. Matt & Froy reclaim Prius from role-players.
Video.title: Role-players and Blade Swayers

Video.summary: Sonia and Froy's repo turns bizarre with strangers. Lou, Lyndah face indecent ranchers; chaos at pool hall.
Video.title: Caught with Their Pants Down

Video.summary: Sonia & Lyndah confront student. Matt & Sonia face armed thugs. Lou & Sonia repo Escalade from couple.
Video.title: Honor Rolling Away

Video.summary: Matt & Froy call cops for old-timer. Lou & Froy clash with bowler. Froy & Lyndah deal with Altima owner.
Video.title: Tazed and Amazed

Video.summary: Lou & Sonia pursue Porsche & Audi. Matt & Froy recover truck. Matt & Lou seize BMW from rich couple.
Video.title: Intoxicated Marina Idiots

Video.summary: Lou devises a plan to have Froy and Sonia pose as house buyers.
Video.title: Playing the Role

Video.summary: Froy, Lou & Matt face bodybuilders for Jeep. Lou & Lyndah startle broker. Froy learns text lesson from Sonia.
Video.title: Broken Bones and Broken Phones

Video.summary: Matt & Lou handle accountant & son. Sonia & Froy manage pool party. They chase a hearse.
Video.title: The Hearse Isn't Empty?

Video.summary: Sonia & Lou encounter economy impact. Matt & Sonia deal with spoiled princess and unpaid bill on Jetta.
Video.title: Froy Gets Beat Up

Video.summary: Froy & Lyndah handle bride. Matt intervenes with players. Sonia, Lyndah, Froy, & Lou tackle flaming car.
Video.title: This Is No Fantasy

Video.summary: Lou, Sonia, and Froy find an RV missing for 30 years, now used by young Canadian rock stars.
Video.title: The Missing RV and the Private Jet

Image.alt: The Missing RV and the Private Jet
The Missing RV and the Private Jet
The Missing RV and the Private Jet

Video.summary: Lou, Sonia, and Matt face tough truckers; Lyndah and Lou expose a scam; the team confronts a club princess.
Video.title: Pyramid Scams and Princesses

Video.summary: The team repos jet skis at the beach, confronts a skilled masseuse, and unknowingly pulls a costly prank.
Video.title: Jet Skis and Massages

Video.summary: Lou, Sonia, and Froy repo a taxicab with a drunk client, while Matt and Froy repo a stuck-in-the-80s DeLorean.
Video.title: Get That Prowler

Video.summary: Lou, Froy, and Matt tackle two hot air balloons, repo a sports car, and handle graffiti girls with Frankie.
Video.title: Up Up and Away

Video.summary: Lou, Froy, and Matt team up with Eva, an alluring agent, to repo a limousine in an elaborate sting operation.
Video.title: Family Drama

Video.summary: Repo tension escalates; kegger chaos ensues; explosive surprise shocks.
Video.title: Kegger and Refrigerator

Video.summary: Sonia, Froy repo biodiesel car, owner resembles Sonia.
Video.title: Going Green and Falling Down

Video.summary: Sonia and Froy face angry debtors; Lou and Matt tangle with a taser-wielding P.I.; Frankie jeopardizes Matt.
Video.title: Look What You Did!

Video.summary: First, Matt and Froy discuss what they will do with their severance pay once the company is sold.
Video.title: Now Serving Mrs. Pizarro

Video.summary: A professional stunt driver slips through Froy and Sonia's grasp, sending them on a violent high speed chase.
Video.title: Taken for a Ride

Video.summary: The cast takes viewers back through the most outrageous, comical, and memorable repos of the series.
Video.title: It Ain't No Joke!

Video.summary: A mischievous magician gets Ronnie and Carlos to stick together when they interrupt his show to grab his car.
Video.title: Tricks and Treats
